name: Sweet-And-Sour Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon instant minced onion, see note
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the beef, bread crumbs, salt, pepper, and eggs.
2. Add onion and half of the tomato sauce to the mixture.
3. Form the mixture into a loaf in a 9-in x 5-in x 3-in pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes.
5. In a saucepan, combine sugars, vinegar, mustard, and remaining tomato sauce.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil.
7. Pour over the meat loaf; bake an additional 10 minutes.
YIELD: 6 servings
